title: taraxacum inclinorum
intro: Taraxacum inclinorum, also known as the Sichuan dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and lower cholesterol levels. The health benefits of Taraxacum inclinorum include its potential to improve liver function, boost the immune system, and aid in the removal of toxins from the body. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum inclinorum include infusions, decoctions, and dried roots, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and capsules for medicinal purposes.
